target.title: cwd outside projectHome does not leak unrelated AGENTS
target.test: buildContext must not read AGENTS.md from cwd when cwd is outside the session's declared projectHome, while environment_context still records the actual cwd.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "user instructions ignore cwd AGENTS outside declared projectHome".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

target.passCriteria: Home and project AGENTS contents appear, outside cwd AGENTS content is absent, and environment_context contains the outside cwd.
